title: Skradin Winery Transfers | Plastovo, Bibich & Sladić | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Skradin to the Plastovo wineries, Bibich and Sladić. Fixed price per car, agreed in advance. Transport only, you arrange the tasting.
keywords: skradin winery transfer, plastovo winery taxi, bibich winery skradin, sladic winery transfer, skradin to plastovo taxi

schema.name: Skradin Winery Transfers
schema.description: Private taxi and transfer from Skradin to the Plastovo wineries, Bibich and Sladić. Fixed price per car for up to 4 passengers, agreed in advance. Transport only; the tasting is arranged with and paid to the winery.

mainEntity.name: How much is a winery transfer from Skradin?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is a fixed price per car, up to 4 passengers, agreed in advance. It depends on which wineries you visit and whether I wait or return later, so send me your plan on WhatsApp and I will confirm the exact price before you book.
No. I handle the transport only. You book the tasting with the winery and pay them directly. I do not charge for the visit or per person.

mainEntity.name: Can you wait and take us back?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I wait nearby and bring you home whenever you are ready, or come back at a time we set.

mainEntity.name: Can we visit both Bibich and Sladić?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Both are close to Skradin and easy to combine in one trip. Tell me what you would like and I will plan the timing and the fixed price.
